sections.title: Introduction
sections.text: Generative AI Engineer - Interview Prep Cheat Sheet 1. LLMs & GenAI Basics LLMs (Large Language Models) - bade AI models jo human-like text samajh aur generate kar sakte hain. Popular frameworks: LangChain, LLaMA, HuggingFace Transformers.

sections.title: Key Concepts
sections.text: - Zero-shot Prompting: bina example ke model ko kaam dena. - Few-shot Prompting: thode examples deke task samjhana. - Chain-of-Thought: step-by-step reasoning.

sections.title: Code Example (HuggingFace)
sections.text: from transformers import pipeline nlp = pipeline("text-generation", model="gpt2") print(nlp("Hello, AI!")) Deployment: API banake (FastAPI/Django) model ko endpoint par serve karna. 2. Django REST API with ML Models

sections.title: Steps
sections.text: 1. Django Project create karo. 2. ML model ko load karo (pickle, .pt, .h5). 3. Views me endpoint banao jo input lega, model se result nikaalega, aur return karega. 4. Serializer ka use karo JSON format maintain karne ke liye.

sections.title: def predict(request)
sections.text: img = request.FILES['image'] result = model_infer(img) return JsonResponse({'prediction': result}) 3. Geospatial + Computer Vision Geospatial data - location-based data (maps, satellite imagery). Formats: GeoJSON, Shapefile, GeoTIFF.

sections.title: Libraries
sections.text: - geopandas: vector data ke liye - rasterio: raster data ke liye - OpenCV: image processing (blur, edge detection, object detection)

sections.title: Example
sections.text: import geopandas as gpd data = gpd.read_file("map.geojson") print(data.head()) Generative AI Engineer - Interview Prep Cheat Sheet 4. RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) RAG ka matlab hai LLM ko external knowledge dena taaki accurate answer aaye. Vector DB (Pinecone, FAISS) embeddings store karta hai.

sections.title: Steps
sections.text: 1. Text ko embedding me convert karo (Sentence Transformers). 2. Vector DB me store karo. 3. Query ke waqt relevant vectors retrieve karke LLM ko pass karo. 5. MLOps Quick Guide

sections.title: Tools
sections.text: - Docker: app ko container me package karna. - Git: version control. - AWS/GCP/Azure: cloud deployment.

sections.title: Example Dockerfile
sections.text: FROM python:3.9 WORKDIR /app COPY requirements.txt . RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

sections.title: COPY . .
sections.text: CMD ["python", "app.py"] 6. Behavioral Questions 1. Why Vasundharaa Geo Technologies? - Geospatial AI projects me kaam karne ka interest, real-world impact.
